architecture.frontend: React (Vite) SPA + react-router-dom + i18next (with lazy API fetching & local translation fallback)
architecture.ai_provider: Embedded LLM Router (unified OpenAI-compat format — Gemini, Groq, Mistral, OpenRouter dynamic free, Pollinations no-key fallback)

files.purpose: Database migrations and seed data for the 7 existing blogs
files.content: -- SQL Schema and seed data for the blog_posts table (Supabase/PostgreSQL)

files.purpose: Cron job endpoint that handles gap analysis, article generation, translation, internal linking, and database publication via OmniRoute gateway
files.content: Serverless function running on Vercel at /api/blog/generate — sends OpenAI-compatible requests to OmniRoute (model: auto)

files.purpose: Client-facing endpoint to fetch localized posts matching i18n language selectors
files.content: Serverless function running on Vercel at /api/blog/posts

files.purpose: Updated React page to render posts dynamically with SEO meta injection and URL deep-linking
files.content: Vite React component for the Blog UI

variables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
variables.purpose: Google Gemini API key (free tier: 1500 req/day). Skipped if not set.

variables.name: GROQ_API_KEY
variables.purpose: Groq API key (free tier). Skipped if not set.

variables.name: MISTRAL_API_KEY
variables.purpose: Mistral API key (free tier). Skipped if not set.

variables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
variables.purpose: OpenRouter API key (dynamic free model discovery). Skipped if not set.

variables.name: CRON_SECRET
variables.purpose: Random security token used to authenticate request calls from the scheduler

prompt_templates.blog_generation: You are an expert e-commerce and SEO strategist. Analyze the following list of existing blog posts and identify a major content gap. Then, write a brand new, premium, human-like Turkish blog post that covers this gap...
prompt_templates.translation: Translate and localize the following Turkish blog post into [language]. Rules: 1. English = clear, professional, global tone. Arabic = simple, modern Fusha tone. 2. Do not do a word-for-word translation...
prompt_templates.internal_linking: Select EXACTLY 2 related blog posts from the 'Existing Blog Posts' list. Insert links to them inside the content using HTML tags: ANCHOR_TEXT. Select EXACTLY 1 relevant service page from the 'Website Service Pages' list. Insert a link to it using HTML tag: ANCHOR_TEXT.

deployment_steps: Step 1: Setup a free database in Supabase and run api/blog/schema.sql in the SQL Editor to create tables and seed data.
Step 2: Obtain a free Gemini API Key from Google AI Studio.
Step 3: Setup local development environment variables in a .env file.
Step 4: Keep the project strictly local for now as requested. Test endpoints using local serverless execution (e.g. vercel dev).
Step 5: When ready to publish, add the environment variables in Vercel settings and deploy.
notes: Gemini 1.5/2.0 Flash is used because its Free Tier offers 1,500 requests per day at $0 cost, making it completely free for our 12-hour schedule.
The client page automatically falls back to local translation JSON files if the Supabase database is unreachable, ensuring high uptime.
Deep-linking is supported via the '?post=slug' parameter to ensure specific posts are SEO crawlable and shareable.
